---
id: adminsearch
title: "Search the index (admin)"
description: "Retrieves results for search query without respect for permissions. This is available only to privileged users."
sidebar_label: "Search the index (admin)"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: api/client-api/search/glean-api-search
custom_edit_url: null
---

This endpoint is in Beta. Expect changes and instability.

:::

Retrieves results for search query without respect for permissions. This is available only to privileged users.
